channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: Anime News Network Animation Veteran Kunihiko Hamada Departs From Madhouse
item.description: Hamada claims he received no severance pay after over 20 years as staff employee ― Animator and character designer Kunihiko Hamada confirmed on Sunday, his birthday, that he is no longer working at... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Animation Veteran Kunihiko Hamada Departs From Madhouse

item.title: [CAST][公开] Anime News Network Like a Dragon/Yakuza Stage Play 公开 Main 声优阵容, August Debut
item.description: Show runs from August 21-30 featuring top characters from last year's popularity poll ― The staff for the Like a Dragon/Yakuza game's planned stage play announced on Tuesday the play will run in... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Like a Dragon/Yakuza Stage Play Reveals Main Cast, August Debut

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Sakuyama Chocojiro Chocolate Biscuits Gets Short 动画 Series
item.description: New episodes debut every Friday ― Shoei Delicy announced on Friday its Sakuyama Chocojiro chocolate biscuits will get an anime series in the form of shorts on YouTube. The first 10 episodes launched... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Sakuyama Chocojiro Chocolate Biscuits Gets Short Anime Series

item.title: [动画][开播] Anime News Network 动画 Expo Hosts World Premieres Black Torch, Magic Knight Rayearth 动画
item.description: Also: Master Detective Archives: RAIN CODE producer Shohei Sakakibara, scenario writer Kazutaka Kodaka attend July 2-5 convention ― The staff of Anime Expo 2026 revealed on Friday that the event will... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Anime Expo Hosts World Premieres of Black Torch, Magic Knight Rayearth Anime

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network MediaOCD Release Restored HD Vampire Princess Miyu 动画 on BD on its Website Only on September 8
item.description: Limited release will feature completely blank cover due to approval issues ― AnimEigo and MediaOCD announced on Thursday they will release the restored HD Blu-ray Disc of the 1988-1989 four-episode... | 来源: ANN | 原文: MediaOCD to Release Restored HD Vampire Princess Miyu Anime on BD on its Website Only on September 8

item.title: [剧场版] Anime News Network Paradox Live 动画 Gets Film Project by Studio GRAPH77
item.description: 29 characters in 9 teams to appear, including ones who were not in TV anime ― The "Paradox Live Dope Show 2026" event announced this weekend that the Paradox Live The Animation series will have an... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Paradox Live The Animation Gets Film Project by Studio GRAPH77

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Heroine? Saint? No, Im an All-Works Maid ( Proud It)! Anime的 新作 Video 公开 More 声优阵容, Songs, June 24 Early Streaming
item.description: Yūki Ono, Shun Horie, Shūgo Nakamura join cast ― The official website for the television anime of Atekichi and Yukiko's Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)! (Heroine? Seijo?... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!' Anime's New Video Unveils More Cast, Songs, June 24 Early Streaming

item.title: [动画][CAST][公开] Anime News Network Daemons Shadow Realm 动画 公开 追加 声优阵容 Members
item.description: Yū Shimamura, Hayato Fujii, Ayumu Murase, Ako Mayama, Shigeru Chiba join anime's cast ― The staff for the television anime of Hiromu Arakawa's Daemons of the Shadow Realm (Yomi no Tsugai) manga... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Daemons of the Shadow Realm Anime Unveils Additional Cast Members

item.title: [动画][PV][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Chainsmoker Cat TV 动画 公开 Main 预告PV, Theme Song Artists, More 制作阵容 Members
item.description: Rock band Wasureranneyo performs "Nanmonee" opening song, Necry Talkie performs "Kemuri to Blue" ending song ― The staff for the television anime of Nyan Nyan Factory's Chainsmoker Cat (Yanineko)... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Chainsmoker Cat TV Anime Reveals Main Trailer, Theme Song Artists, More Staff Members

item.title: [剧场版] MyAnimeList Paradox Live 动画 Gets Movie
item.description: The Paradox Live Dope Show 2026 event announced an anime movie for the franchise on Sunday. The movie will be produced by Studio Graph77, featuring 29 characters from 9 teams, including those who... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Paradox Live The Animation' Gets Movie

No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!) unveiled... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (Hokori)!' Unveils Additional Cast, Theme Songs, First Promo

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList 第三 季度 Dorohedoro Announced
item.description: The 11th and final episode of Dorohedoro Season 2 revealed on Thursday that the third season is in production. The official website also released an illustration (pictured) drawn by the series'... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Third Season of 'Dorohedoro' Announced

item.title: [PV][CAST][STAFF][开播][公开] MyAnimeList Tenmaku no Jaadugar 公开 追加 声优阵容, 制作阵容, 开播 Theme, 第二 宣传视频

item.title: [CAST][发表] MyAnimeList Tank Chair 宣布 Main 声优阵容
